title: Mindcraft – Minecraft AI with LLMs+Mineflayer
abstract: Mindcraft transforms your Minecraft experience by integrating advanced language models and the Mineflayer plugin, allowing for smoother interactions with in-game characters. Imagine having an AI assistant that can help you build castles or dig for minerals alongside you! Join now and let's create magic together in this blocky world.
abstract_zh: Mindcraft，你是不是也曾经幻想过，自己的AI小助手能在Minecraft里陪你一起建城堡、挖矿石？现在，这一切都变成现实啦！Mindcraft 是一个结合了先进语言模型和Mineflayer插件的神器，让你与游戏中的角色互动更顺畅。快来加入吧，让我们一起在方块世界中创造奇迹！
